title: apium flexuosum
intro: Apium flexuosum, also known as sea celery or wild celery, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Apium flexuosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Apium flexuosum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
